name: Humane Labs
desc: Humane Labs & Research is San Andreas's most controversial pharmaceutical and biotechnology company. Their remote desert facility has attracted persistent rumours about classified government contracts and non-consensual research programmes.

history.event: Founded with a $200M classified government grant.
First laboratory facility opens in Grand Senora Desert.
Three researchers go missing. Company denies any connection.
IPO raises $800M despite zero disclosed revenue sources.
Facility reportedly raided. Company releases no statement.
Senate hearing on human research ethics. CEO declines to testify.
